revision.comment: [[WP:AES|←]]新しいページ: 「{{各世紀日本の教育}} 18世紀日本の[[教育]]に関するカテゴリ。 {{デフォルトソート:18 にほん きよういく}} Category:…」

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "[[Category:categories missing wikidata]]" to "[[Category:Categories missing wikidata but with jawiki]]"
adding dummy category to make categories work

Text replacement - "[[Category:pages]]" to "[[Category:Categories]]"

Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)

Bot: normalize category page structure (templates/interwikis/categories only)
revision.text: <!--templates--> {{各世紀日本の教育}} {{see also|Category:江戸時代の教育}} {{デフォルトソート:18 にほん きよういく}} {{citation needed|18 にほん きよういく}} {{translated page|1=ja|2=Category:18世紀日本の教育}} {{translated page|ja|Category:18世紀日本の教育|comment=here}} {{translated page|ja|Category:18世紀日本の教育|version=83636596}} <!--interwikis--> [[ja:Category:18世紀日本の教育]] <!--categories--> [[Category:sn_crud|TESTThis category was created from JA→Wikidata links on :Category:18世紀日本の教育者]] [[Category:Categories missing wikidata]] [[Category:Categories missing wikidata but with jawiki]] [[Category:Categories needing translation of Japanese explanatory text]] [[Category:18th century in education]] [[Category:18th century in Japan]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese explanatory text to translate to english]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]] [[Category:Education in Japan by Century]] [[Category:jawiki pages with translated titles]] [[Category:Tier 2 Categories with no enwiki]] [[Category:Tier 2 Categories]] [[Category:Categories missing Wikidata with Japanese interwikis]]

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=18th_Century_Education_in_Japan here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: <!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=18th_Century_Education_in_Japan for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> <!--templates--> {{各世紀日本の教育}} {{see also|Category:江戸時代の教育}} {{translated page|1=ja|2=Category:18世紀日本の教育}} {{translated page|ja|Category:18世紀日本の教育|comment=here}} {{translated page|ja|Category:18世紀日本の教育|version=83636596}} <!--interwikis--> [[ja:Category:18世紀日本の教育]] <!--categories--> [[Category:sn_crud|TESTThis category was created from JA→Wikidata links on :Category:18世紀日本の教育者]] [[Category:18th century in education]] [[Category:18th century in Japan]] [[Category:Education in Japan by Century]] [[Category:Tier 2 Categories with no enwiki]] [[Category:Tier 2 Categories]] [[Category:Pages without wikidata]]
